backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the game press kit backend with user profile management, admin claim logic, content fields (about text, features, game details, social links, YouTube link), and mixins for storage and authorization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that initializes the `youtubeLink` field with a default YouTube URL when the canister state is upgraded.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three implemented features: reducing the game logo size on the landing page, adding a YouTube Link field to the admin CMS, and wiring the YouTube link into the VideoSection component on the press kit page.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads Fredoka One and Inter fonts from Google Fonts and mounts the React app via the `/src/main.tsx` module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (/, /press-kit, /admin), wraps the app in ThemeProvider, and applies the backend-driven body text color globally.
frontend/src/components/FullscreenViewer: Fullscreen image overlay component that closes on Escape key or click, with a close button that stops event propagation.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Minimal site header showing only a Press Kit nav link and dark/light mode toggle, hidden entirely on the /admin route.
frontend/src/components/ImageWithFallbac: Reusable image component that shows an animated skeleton while loading and an 'Image unavailable' placeholder on error.
frontend/src/components/MediaDownloadBut: Button component that triggers a direct browser download of the press kit ZIP file using a programmatically created anchor element.
frontend/src/components/NewsletterPlaceh: Non-functional newsletter signup form with an email input and subscribe button, intended as a placeholder for future implementation.
frontend/src/components/PasswordGateModa: A modal component that prompts users for a password to access the press kit, using the verifyPassword mutation and storing verification state in sessionStorage on success.
frontend/src/components/ScreenshotsGalle: Renders a responsive grid of six game screenshots that open in a fullscreen viewer when clicked.
frontend/src/components/SocialMediaSecti: Displays an Instagram icon link button, rendering nothing if the provided URL is invalid.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: Shows a video thumbnail with a play button overlay that replaces itself with an embedded YouTube iframe when clicked, supporting multiple YouTube URL formats.
frontend/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a React context for light/dark theme state, persisting the preference to localStorage and toggling a 'dark' class on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) via React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including content, admin status, password verification, and various content update operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, and utility styles for backgrounds, screenshots, modals, and transitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin CMS dashboard page that handles Internet Identity login, auto-claims admin role on first login, and provides form fields to edit all press kit content (about text, features, game details, social links, body text color, password protection).
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page displaying the game logo and a 'View Press Kit' button linking to /press-kit, with a footer crediting caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/pages/PressKitPage.tsx: Public press kit page that fetches CMS content, optionally shows a password gate modal, and renders sections for game logo, video, about text, features, game details, screenshots, media downloads, and social links.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Fredoka One, Inter), OKLCH-based design tokens, border radii, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the app's architecture, existing features, known issues, and design decisions for a black-and-white game press kit site with Internet Identity admin auth and a backend CMS on ICP.
